plugins.name: sociology-skillset
plugins.description: Complete academic research toolkit for sociology research with 27 integrated skills supporting qualitative, quantitative, and mixed methods workflows. Use research-coordinator to orchestrate the full workflow. Skills: reference management (zotero [deprecated], zotero-rag [deprecated]), literature review (lit-search, lit-synthesis, reading-agent, argument-builder), qualitative analysis (interview-analyst), quantitative analysis (r-analyst, stata-analyst), computational text analysis (text-analyst), text classification (prompt-optimizer), findings writing (qual-findings-writer, quant-findings-writer, mixed-methods-findings-writer), manuscript drafting (methods-writer, case-justification, contribution-framer, article-bookends with field-specific profiles, abstract-builder), revision support (verifier, peer-reviewer, revision-coordinator, writing-editor, bibliography-builder), and meta-skills (genre-skill-builder, project-scaffold, research-coordinator).

plugins.name: socibook-skillset
plugins.description: Academic monograph writing toolkit with 10 skills for planning and drafting book-length scholarly works, grounded in genre analysis of 22 political sociology and American politics monographs. Skills: architecture (book-architecture), chapter writing (book-introduction, book-theory-chapter, book-context-chapter, book-parallel-case, book-cross-issue, book-quant-chapter, book-conclusion), and revision support (book-editor, book-continuity).
